generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑resolution motor encoder for precise position measurement on the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncMotorPosition
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High‑resolution gearbox encoder for precise position measurement on the first axis."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EncGearboxPosition
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor downstream of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor for measuring operating current I_M."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentValue
]

instance EncMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance EncGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentValue : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of motor position over time for monitoring joint behavior."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncMotorPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance GearboxPositionTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of gearbox position over time for monitoring joint behavior."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncGearboxPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance CurrentTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Trace of motor current I_M used for torque calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentValue
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance TorqueTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque trace derived from motor current and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentValue
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance AngularVelocityTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity trace derived from motor encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EncMotorPosition
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance AccelerationTrace : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated acceleration trace derived from angular velocity data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityTrace
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent‑magnet synchronous motor providing torque τ_M from input current I_M on first axis."
]

instance PrimaryGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary gear transmission transforming motor torque τ_M to gear torque τ_G on first axis."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox delivering final output torque τ_out on first axis."
]

instance SiemensCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D SL CNC controller issuing command signals to the motor and gearbox assemblies."
]

instance MotorDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of permanent‑magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance GearboxDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of primary gearbox dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance SystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of complete first‑axis system combining motor, gearboxes, and controller dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEngine
]

instance FrictionCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model that calculates friction parameters from sensor data traces."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that runs Simulink simulations for motor, gearbox and system dynamics."
]

instance DataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that streams live sensor data via MQTT to the digital twin."
]

instance SemanticExposureService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service that exposes semantic data via Asset Administration Shells."
]

instance SimulinkEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink executable environment for running motor, gearbox, and system simulations."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker facilitating live data streaming from sensors to the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables DataStreamingService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Semantic data exposure via Asset Administration Shells."
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticExposureService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana dashboard stack for real‑time visualization of friction estimation and joint behavior."
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance DataProcessingService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Central processing component linking data ingestion, model inference, and service provision."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ComparisonService, DashboardVisualizationService, FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing continuous friction identification from sensor and model data."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionEstimationInsight
]

instance ComparisonService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated and measured joint behavior."
    DTDFVocab:provides JointBehaviorComparisonInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service delivering real‑time visualization on Grafana dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating actionable friction‑parameter updates for the CNC controller."
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateCNCControllerAction
]

instance FrictionEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight into current friction level of the first axis derived from DT data processing."
]

instance JointBehaviorComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight comparing simulated vs. measured joint behavior to assess model fidelity."
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of joint trajectories, torque, and friction parameters."
]

instance UpdateCNCControllerAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction parameters in the Siemens CNC controller to improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real‑time, ingesting and processing live sensor data continuously at the inherent sensor update rates. No explicit sampling frequency is prescribed in the document; the system is designed to match the PT’s data generation pace."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation comprises (i) Asset Administration Shell representing the first axis, (ii) Engineering model, (iii) Simulation models in Simulink, (iv) Processing component that consumes sensor data and simulated traces, (v) Dashboard for visualization. These components are orchestrated by a central data broker (MQTT) and a processing node."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers the operational stage of the robot: it uses design‑time structural models (ideal simulation), manufacturing‑time asset specifications via AAS, and operational real‑time data for continuous model calibration and validation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is ensured by using analytical friction models (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) in Simulink, compared against live measurements; validity is verified through continuous residual analysis between simulated and measured torque/angle, and traceability links maintain data provenance."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for bi‑directional data transmission: the robot controller publishes sensor topics (current, encoder angle), and the digital twin subscribes. Data points are serialized in a lightweight binary/JSON format as defined by the robot’s data‑streaming interface. No additional protocol or network architecture details are provided."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standard modeling languages and protocols are employed: SysML (ISO/IEC/IFMA standard for system modelling), AAS (Industry 4.0 standard based on IEC 62832/IEC 61849, defining the asset representation), MQTT (ISO/IEC 20900‑1 for lightweight publish/subscribe messaging)."
]
